nodes.label: Liquid Glass Style
nodes.rationale: Flowing glass with morphing elements, fluid animations (400-600ms), dynamic blur, chromatic aberration, iridescent effects

nodes.label: Warm Brown and Cream Color Palette
nodes.rationale: Warm brown (#92400E) + cream (#FEF3C7) creates a cozy, approachable hospitality feel
nodes.norm_label: warm brown and cream color palette

nodes.label: Hero-Centric Page Pattern with Social Proof
nodes.rationale: CTA placed above fold; section order: Hero > Features > CTA
nodes.norm_label: hero-centric page pattern with social proof

nodes.label: Row-Level Security (RLS)
nodes.rationale: Protect meaningful data with RLS policies on all InsForge tables

nodes.label: Real-Time Availability Checking
nodes.rationale: Date conflict prevention using bookings + blocked dates

nodes.label: Guest Checkout
nodes.rationale: No login required for booking; simplifies conversion

nodes.label: Warm Amber and Orange Color Palette
nodes.norm_label: warm amber and orange color palette
